summary: Design Phase 2: ShareCard flip/QR code, onboarding modal, wallet SharedView, redesigned Shares page (PR #18)

prompt: Error handling + retry logic (#65, #66)
summary: Structured logger, API error classifier, retry with exponential backoff (1s/2s/4s), wrapped all Claude-calling routes. 231 tests pass. PR #71.
53 backend tests: auth, documents, shares, middleware. mongodb-memory-server, supertest. uuid ESM shim for Jest. PR #18.

prompt: Expand validation engine (#68)
summary: Added currency, EIN, ITIN, field length, and date range validators. 16 new tests, 44 total pass. PR #72.

prompt: Extension auth sync (#69)
summary: Added 60s auth polling to Chrome extension side panel with visibilitychange lifecycle. PR #74.

prompt: Image preprocessing timeout (#67)
summary: 30s timeout wrapper, HEIC error handling, quality warnings, user-facing error classifier. 19 tests pass. PR #73.

prompt: CI pipeline (#22)
summary: GitHub Actions CI: tsc + vitest on every push/PR for app and CLI. CI badge in README. PR #23.

prompt: Budget management (issue #10)
summary: Budget list screen /budgets with month selector, progress bars, add/edit modal, delete. Dashboard over-budget badge and Manage link. PR #23.

prompt: Settings redesign + extract recurring (#210)
summary: Extracted Monthly Recurring into dedicated tab with summary cards, grouped lists, start date picker. Settings page cleaned up. PR #213.

prompt: Settings screen (issue #7) + Budget management (issue #10)
summary: Settings screen: profile, currency, notifications, logout. Budget list with progress bars, add/edit modal. Dashboard over-budget badge. PRs #21 and #23 merged.

prompt: NLP transaction parsing endpoint (issue #109)
summary: POST /api/transactions/parse-text: Claude Haiku parses Cantonese/English text into structured transaction data. In-memory rate limiter 30/hr, input validation, sanitiseResult guard. 17 tests pass. PR #111.
Document type selector (7-type enum) on upload, HealthCard prefers explicit type, documents API sends documentType. PR #22.

prompt: Push notifications (issue #11)
summary: expo-notifications setup: daily reminders, budget threshold alerts, permission on first budget creation, settings reminder time picker. PR #25.

prompt: Smart auto-suggest (#211)
summary: useSmartSuggestions hook: ranked participants by item+recency+time, time-aware item ordering, auto-category on near-exact match. PR #215.

prompt: NLP sentence input (#212)
summary: NlpInput component, parseTransactionText API, auto-fills form from natural language. Depends on backend #111. PR #216.
Share view audit trail: ShareView model (TTL 30d, IP hashed), GET /:token logs views, GET /:id/views endpoint, lastViewedAt in list. 8 new tests, 114 total. PR #22.
PWA: vite-plugin-pwa, Workbox service worker, manifest HC Trust branding, iOS meta tags, InstallBanner (Android native prompt + iOS instructions, 7d dismiss). PR #23.

prompt: Item Price Index (issue #110)
summary: ItemPrice model with compound unique index. POST /api/item-prices/extract upserts receipt line items atomically. GET /api/item-prices for lookup. GET /api/item-prices/suggest for merchant item list. JWT auth, express-validator, 25 tests pass (57 total). PR #112.

prompt: Participate option (#209)
summary: Third split mode: participate (someone else paid). Backward compat with boolean. PR #217.
Recipient trust page: domain badge, live expiry countdown, trust signals strip, ExpiredState/NotFoundState full-page dark states, staggered post-decrypt animation. PR #24.

prompt: Push notifications + E2E tests (issues #11, #12)
summary: expo-notifications: daily reminders, budget alerts, permission on budget creation. Maestro E2E flows for 6 critical paths. PRs #24, #25 merged.
Web Push notifications: VAPID push service, subscribe/unsubscribe/vapid-key endpoints, daily cron expiry reminders, documentType enum on Document model. 34 tests. PR #23.

prompt: Add icons to Split Bill / My Treat toggle buttons (issue #218)
summary: Added CallSplitIcon and CardGiftcardIcon imports and inline icon elements to ToggleButton split/treat in AddExpenseModal and EditExpenseModal. Zero source-file TS errors. PR #219.
Added CallSplitIcon + CardGiftcardIcon to Split Bill / My Treat toggle buttons in Add and Edit expense modals. PR #219.

prompt: wire sendBudgetAlert — add useEffect in DashboardScreen to fire alerts for budgets at >=80% spend, scoped to current month only
summary: Added useEffect in app/(tabs)/index.tsx to call sendBudgetAlert for each over-threshold budget, completing the push notifications feature

prompt: #13 app store preparation — icons, splash, metadata, screenshots
summary: Added iOS Privacy Manifest, store.config.json with EAS Metadata for both stores (FINANCE category, 4+, description, keywords), eas.json submit config, privacy policy, and screenshot capture guide

prompt: Fix split/treat icons (#218)
summary: Added CallSplitIcon + CardGiftcardIcon to Split Bill / My Treat ToggleButtons in Add and Edit expense modals. PR #220.

prompt: fix spurious test failures from stale worktree files
summary: Added /.claude/ to testPathIgnorePatterns in jest.config.js — fixes 11 failing tests caused by background agent worktree leftovers
